business.description: Expert physiotherapy in Limassol specialising in injury rehabilitation, post-surgery recovery, and sports performance.

seo.title: Liasides Physio — Sports Injury & Rehab | Limassol
seo.description: Expert physiotherapy in Limassol, Cyprus. Specialising in injury rehab, post-surgery recovery, and helping athletes return to peak performance. Rated 4.9★ on Google.

hero.headline: Your Path to Full Recovery and Optimal Strength.
hero.subheadline: Expert injury rehabilitation and sports physiotherapy in Limassol.

about.headline: We Don't Just Treat Pain — We Fix What Caused It
about.description: Multiple patients have come to us after being told surgery was their only option — and left fully recovered without it. Our approach is built on identifying the root cause of your injury, designing a structured rehab plan with clear progression, and getting you back to the activities you love. Whether you're an athlete preparing for competition or someone who just wants to live without pain, every session has purpose, every exercise has a reason, and every patient is treated as a human being — not a number.

features.title: Root Cause, Not Symptoms
features.description: We identify what's actually driving your pain and build a treatment plan around it — not a generic exercise sheet.

features.title: Structured Rehab Plans
features.description: Every session has clear goals and progression. You'll understand exactly where you are and what comes next.

features.title: Surgery Isn't Always the Answer
features.description: Many of our patients recovered fully after being told they needed surgery. We explore every option before the operating table.

therapist.name: Marios Liasides
therapist.title: Lead Physiotherapist
therapist.bio: Specialising in sports injury rehabilitation, post-surgical recovery, and strength & conditioning for athletes.

services.headline: Specialised Treatment for Real Injuries
services.subheadline: From post-surgery knee rehab to getting fighters back in the ring — every program is built around your specific injury, your body, and your goals.

items.title: Sports Injury Rehabilitation
items.description: Structured rehab for ACL tears, meniscus injuries, ligament damage, and muscle tears. Return to sport stronger and more resilient.

items.title: Surgery Prevention & Alternative Rehab
items.description: Multiple patients came to us facing surgery and recovered fully without it. We explore every evidence-based option first.

items.title: Post-Surgery Recovery
items.description: Guided rehabilitation following ACL, SLAP, spinal, and joint surgery. Phased progression from day one to full function.

items.title: Back & Disc Injury Treatment
items.description: Effective treatment for disc bulges, spondylolisthesis, nerve pain, and chronic lower back conditions — without relying on painkillers.

items.title: Combat Sports & Fighter Rehab
items.description: Sport-specific rehab and S&C for MMA, BJJ, and combat athletes. Get back to training — not just pain-free, but fight-ready.

items.title: Strength & Conditioning
items.description: Performance-focused programs that combine rehab, mobility, strength, and sport-specific conditioning to prevent future injuries.

reviews.headline: Trusted by 127+ Patients in Limassol
reviews.subheadline: Real results from real people — from avoiding surgery to returning to competition.

items.name: Konstantinos G.
items.text: Doctors told me surgery might be my only option. After two months with Marios, I fully healed — no surgery, no pain. He doesn't just treat symptoms; he identifies the root cause and builds a proper plan. If you train MMA or Jiu Jitsu, his S&C will take you to another level. I feel stronger and more explosive than before the injury.

items.name: Rebecca K.
items.text: I was diagnosed with a disc bulge and had been suffering severe pain for over a month. Cortisone and strong painkillers weren't helping. After just four sessions with Marios, my pain was completely gone. I am extremely grateful for the professionalism, knowledge, and support I received.

items.name: Stella E.
items.text: A stress reaction in the hip and pelvis had forced me to stop running. Through Marios' expertise and step-by-step guidance, I'm returning to running in very good physical condition. Most importantly, he took into account the psychological dimension — respecting my fear and anxiety with empathy. He doesn't treat you as just a number.

items.name: Paris L.
items.text: After a motorcycle accident, every doctor told me surgery was urgently needed for my AC joint. Thanks to Marios, I recovered without surgery. His knowledge, hands-on treatment, and structured rehab plan made a huge difference. I'm back to normal function and extremely grateful.

therapist.headline: Meet Marios Liasides
therapist.name: Marios Liasides
therapist.title: Lead Physiotherapist & Sports Rehab Specialist
therapist.bio: Marios specialises in getting people back to full function — whether that's a professional fighter returning to competition, a runner overcoming a stress injury, or someone recovering from spinal surgery. His patients consistently highlight one thing: he treats the root cause, not just the symptoms. With a structured, evidence-based approach to rehabilitation and a genuine investment in every patient's recovery, Marios has helped athletes avoid surgery, overcome chronic pain, and return to performance stronger than before their injury.
credentials: Experience with ACL, SLAP, spinal, and combat sports injuries

location.headline: Visit Our Clinic
